description: Single source of truth for the third-party npm packages the .agents/ framework scripts import at runtime. This manifest ships *inside* .agents/ so it travels with the mandrel package into consumer projects. Consumers must provide these packages in the node_modules resolvable from their repository root (the framework scripts free-ride on the consumer's install). The `dependencies` block is fail-fast enforced by the preflight guard (.agents/scripts/lib/runtime-deps/ensure-installed.js); the `optionalDependencies` block lists packages that are imported behind graceful-degradation paths (try/catch or dev-only watch tooling) and are therefore declared but never preflight-blocked. A drift test (tests/scripts/runtime-deps-drift.test.js) asserts every third-party import under .agents/scripts/** is declared here. Version ranges mirror the framework's own root package.json.
